name: Stuffed Pepper Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Corn, in the cob (blanched and cut)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the tops of the peppers and clean out the seeds.
2. Cook the peppers in water until they are tender for 20 minutes.
3. Brown the ground beef and onions together in a pan.
4. Add seasonings, rice, corn, and tomato sauce to the meat mixture. Stir until everything is well combined.
5. Spoon the filling into the peppers.
6. Place any remaining filling around the peppers in the casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until heated through.
